products.description: The solid wood is warm and delicate, vaguely revealing the elegance and nobility of the precipitation of the years, but not cold. It carries the story of the years, precipitating and exuding its own light, like the quiet and boundless earth.

Light is a way to create a space atmosphere, it is a catalyst for space, can enhance the texture and layer of decoration. With the change of light and shade, the light is more three-dimensional, so that life is more romantic.

Ultra-matte synchronous wood grain gives the veneer a more realistic visual experience. Delivers soft, delicate textures and touches. The intersection and integration of internal and external charm, integrated into one, enjoy the natural flavor.

The 9108 series flooring allows you to express your unique style, creating a home that reflects your preferences rather than conforming to others' expectations. Each design is unique, encouraging you to follow your heart.
